languages.text: {n}Движущая сила вспышкой проходит сквозь аугментированную руку Экзальта-117, но вязнет в выступившем из железной конечности изоляте, не причиняя техножрецу видимого вреда. Магос удивленно поводит плечами — похоже, его системы безопасности настроены куда совершенней, чем вы предполагали.{/n}

{n}The Motive Force sparks through Exalt-117's augmented arm, but fades into the isolate protruding from his metal limb, causing no visible harm to the Tech-Priest. The Magos's shoulders jump in surprise — it seems his security systems are more finely tuned than you realised.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Движущая сила вспышкой проходит сквозь аугментированную руку Экзальта-117, но вязнет в выступившем из железной конечности изоляте, не причиняя техножрецу видимого вреда. Магос удивленно поводит плечами — похоже, его системы безопасности настроены куда совершенней, чем вы предполагали.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The Motive Force sparks through Exalt-117's augmented arm, but fades into the isolate protruding from his metal limb, causing no visible harm to the Tech-Priest. The Magos's shoulders jump in surprise — it seems his security systems are more finely tuned than you realised.{/n}

{n}The Motive Force sparks through Exalt-117's augmented arm, but fades into the isolate protruding from his metal limb, causing no visible harm to the Tech-Priest. The Magos's shoulders jump in surprise — it seems his security systems are more finely tuned than you realised.{/n}

{n}The Motive Force sparks through Exalt-117's augmented arm, but fades into the isolate protruding from his metal limb, causing no visible harm to the Tech-Priest. The Magos's shoulders jump in surprise — it seems his security systems are more finely tuned than you realised.{/n}

languages.text: {n}源力火花掠过尊使-117加装了植入物的手臂，却消散于从金属肢体中突出的绝缘部件，未对这位技术神甫造成明显伤害。贤者的肩膀惊得微微一抖，看来他的安保系统比你想的还要精密。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Motive Force sparks through Exalt-117's augmented arm, but fades into the isolate protruding from his metal limb, causing no visible harm to the Tech-Priest. The Magos's shoulders jump in surprise — it seems his security systems are more finely tuned than you realised.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}源力火花掠过尊使-117加装了植入物的手臂，却消散于从金属肢体中突出的绝缘部件，未对这位技术神甫造成明显伤害。贤者的肩膀惊得微微一抖，看来他的安保系统比你想的还要精密。{/n}

languages.text: {n}La Force Motrice traverse le bras augmenté d'Exalt-117, mais elle est absorbée par l'isolant fiché dans son épaule de métal sans causer de dommages visibles au technoprêtre, qui se contente de sursauter de surprise. Il semblerait que ses systèmes de sécurité soient plus efficaces que vous le pensiez.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Motive Force sparks through Exalt-117's augmented arm, but fades into the isolate protruding from his metal limb, causing no visible harm to the Tech-Priest. The Magos's shoulders jump in surprise — it seems his security systems are more finely tuned than you realised.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La Force Motrice traverse le bras augmenté d'Exalt-117, mais elle est absorbée par l'isolant fiché dans son épaule de métal sans causer de dommages visibles au technoprêtre, qui se contente de sursauter de surprise. Il semblerait que ses systèmes de sécurité soient plus efficaces que vous le pensiez.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Devinim Gücü, Yüce-117'nin ogmentli kolundan kıvılcımlar saçıyor. Ancak metal uzvundan dışarı taşan yalıtkanın içinde sönümlenerek Tekno Rahip'e kayda değer bir zarar vermiyor. Magos'un omuzları şaşkınlıkla kalkıp iniyor. Anlaşılan güvenlik sistemleri, sandığından ince ayarlanmış.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Motive Force sparks through Exalt-117's augmented arm, but fades into the isolate protruding from his metal limb, causing no visible harm to the Tech-Priest. The Magos's shoulders jump in surprise — it seems his security systems are more finely tuned than you realised.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Devinim Gücü, Yüce-117'nin ogmentli kolundan kıvılcımlar saçıyor. Ancak metal uzvundan dışarı taşan yalıtkanın içinde sönümlenerek Tekno Rahip'e kayda değer bir zarar vermiyor. Magos'un omuzları şaşkınlıkla kalkıp iniyor. Anlaşılan güvenlik sistemleri, sandığından ince ayarlanmış.{/n}

languages.text: {n}La Fuerza Motriz atraviesa el brazo aumentado de Exaltado-117, pero desaparece en el aislante que sobresale de su extremidad metálica, lo que evita daños al tecnosacerdote. Los hombros del magos saltan de sorpresa: parece que sus sistemas de seguridad son más sofisticados de lo que esperabas.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Motive Force sparks through Exalt-117's augmented arm, but fades into the isolate protruding from his metal limb, causing no visible harm to the Tech-Priest. The Magos's shoulders jump in surprise — it seems his security systems are more finely tuned than you realised.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La Fuerza Motriz atraviesa el brazo aumentado de Exaltado-117, pero desaparece en el aislante que sobresale de su extremidad metálica, lo que evita daños al tecnosacerdote. Los hombros del magos saltan de sorpresa: parece que sus sistemas de seguridad son más sofisticados de lo que esperabas.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Antriebskraft fährt in den augmentierten Arm von Exalt-117, verliert sich aber in seiner metallenen Gliedmaße, ohne dem Techpriester sichtbaren Schaden zuzufügen. Die Schultern des Magos zucken überrascht — seine Sicherheitssysteme scheinen feiner justiert zu sein, als du dachtest.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Motive Force sparks through Exalt-117's augmented arm, but fades into the isolate protruding from his metal limb, causing no visible harm to the Tech-Priest. The Magos's shoulders jump in surprise — it seems his security systems are more finely tuned than you realised.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Antriebskraft fährt in den augmentierten Arm von Exalt-117, verliert sich aber in seiner metallenen Gliedmaße, ohne dem Techpriester sichtbaren Schaden zuzufügen. Die Schultern des Magos zucken überrascht — seine Sicherheitssysteme scheinen feiner justiert zu sein, als du dachtest.{/n}

languages.text: {n}動機付けの力によって、エクセルタント117の強化された腕がスパークするが、金属製の腕から突き出た孤立した部分に消えてしまい、テクプリストに目に見える被害を与えない。マゴスの肩が驚いて跳ね上がる。彼のセキュリティシステムは、あなたが思っていたよりも精密に調整されているようだ。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Motive Force sparks through Exalt-117's augmented arm, but fades into the isolate protruding from his metal limb, causing no visible harm to the Tech-Priest. The Magos's shoulders jump in surprise — it seems his security systems are more finely tuned than you realised.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}動機付けの力によって、エクセルタント117の強化された腕がスパークするが、金属製の腕から突き出た孤立した部分に消えてしまい、テクプリストに目に見える被害を与えない。マゴスの肩が驚いて跳ね上がる。彼のセキュリティシステムは、あなたが思っていたよりも精密に調整されているようだ。{/n}
